scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @opencanvas/web exec prettier --write ../.. --ignore-path ../../.gitignore && python -m ruff format --config apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api scripts
scripts.format:api: python -m ruff format --config apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api scripts
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @opencanvas/web exec prettier --check ../.. --ignore-path ../../.gitignore && python -m ruff format --check --config apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api scripts
scripts.format:check:api: python -m ruff format --check --config apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api scripts
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @opencanvas/web lint && python -m ruff check --config apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api scripts
scripts.lint:api: python -m ruff check --config apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api scripts
scripts.test:integration: python -m pytest apps/api/tests/test_canvas_api.py apps/api/tests/test_document_api.py apps/api/tests/test_grounded_ai.py apps/api/tests/test_canonical_api.py apps/api/tests/test_trace_api.py
scripts.validate:demo: pnpm demo:reset && pnpm demo:check && pnpm demo:smoke
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build && pnpm validate:migrations && pnpm validate:demo && pnpm validate:hygiene
